title: Jury costs; demand by expropriating authority
doc_html:
§15.  Jury costs; demand by expropriating authority

If the expropriating authority has demanded a jury trial to determine compensation, the costs of the jury trial shall be assessed against the expropriating authority.  

Acts 1990, No. 133, §2.
